svg.aria-label: clean for school - Wardrobe AI Try-On Preview

g.text: This is a styled preview overlay,

div.style: font-family: Avenir Next, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.45; color: #4b5560;

foreignObject.div: This outfit matches your clean direction for school. The lighter-to-darker contrast between the top and pants gives the outfit balanced structure. It should also feel right for mild weather.
